top_items.title: AI Is Not Improving Productivity: Nobel Laureate Daron Acemoglu
top_items.one_liner: Acemoglu argues AI productivity gains are overstated — essential provocation for any executive AI business case conversation.

top_items.title: AI Coding Tools for Knowledge Work: What Executives Need to Know
top_items.one_liner: Executives guide to AI coding tools like Claude Code — argues these reshape knowledge work far beyond software development.

top_items.title: Anthropic launches a multi-agent code review tool for Claude Code
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic's new multi-agent code review for Claude Code addresses quality gaps as AI-generated code volume surges.
